versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install eck-operator oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=eck-operator:3.3.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install eck-stack oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=eck-stack:0.18.0" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   eck-operator-3-3-0              true
# kcm-system   eck-stack-0-18-0                true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: eck-stack
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: eck-operator-3-3-0
      name: eck-operator
      namespace: eck-stack
    - template: eck-stack-0-18-0
      name: eck-stack
      namespace: eck-stack
      dependsOn:
      - name: eck-operator
        namespace: eck-stack

versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install eck-operator oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=eck-operator:3.3.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install eck-stack oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=eck-stack:0.16.0" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   eck-operator-3-3-0              true
# kcm-system   eck-stack-0-16-0                true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: eck-stack
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: eck-operator-3-3-0
      name: eck-operator
      namespace: eck-stack
    - template: eck-stack-0-16-0
      name: eck-stack
      namespace: eck-stack
      dependsOn:
      - name: eck-operator
        namespace: eck-stack
